chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6712 of 2022 M/s Medzntech (Private) Limited Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 28337/22 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 08.08.2024 Mr. Saddam Hussain holds brief for Mr. Shahab Imam for petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Faheem Raza for respondents No.6 and 7. -.-.- Learned counsel appearing for petitioner submits that he has been instructed by the petitioner that the purpose of this petition has been served and hence he does not press this petition. The petition is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
